name: Chinese Fortune Cookies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a baking sheet and dust it lightly with flour.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Beat eggs and gradually mix in powdered sugar while beating until the mixture is very thick.
4. Gradually beat in water (about 1 tablespoon at a time).
5. Add almond flavoring, mixing thoroughly.
6. Gently fold in the flour until combined; do not overmix.
7. Drop the batter by level tablespoonfuls onto the buttered sheet, about 5 inches apart.
8. Bake until lightly browned.
9. Remove from oven and shape while still warm, inserting fortunes.
10. Let cool in glasses to hold the form.
